title: Alcohol Use Screening Tests: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
ou. 
Medicines. Certain medicines may reduce your cravings for alcohol. These medicines are to help you stop, cut back, quit, or not start drinking again.

Addressing Alcohol Use Practice Manual: An Alcohol Screening and Brief Intervention Program; [cited 2024 Feb 22]; [about 23 screens].
